steps.title: Notice the scale factor
steps.content:
The second cable circumference is twice the first.
$$6.50=2(3.25)$$
Because the model uses $x^2$, doubling $x$ multiplies $y$ by $2^2=4$.

steps.title: Scale the breaking strength
steps.content:
Multiply the given breaking strength by $4$.
$$13{,}097.5\cdot4=52{,}390$$
The answer is 52390.
